Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts

From the spec: Block pattern is [(0,0), (1,0), (0,1), (1,1)] → same (still life, each has 3 neighbors).
The output should be the same 4 cells in any order.

The implementation already handles this correctly since each cell in the block has exactly 3 neighbors (survival) and no dead cell adjacent to the block has exactly 3 live neighbors (the corner neighbors have only 1-2 live neighbors).

This test will pass immediately.

Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
